title: Camping Supply Checklist
text:
## Camping Supply Checklist

For the trip to {place}, pack one {adjective} tent, {number} flashlights, and a {color} {object}.

Bring enough {food} for everyone, plus extra {plural noun} in case {person} gets {emotion}.

If a {animal} approaches, do not {verb}; simply begin {verb ending in -ing} {adverb}.

Wear a warm {clothing item} and protect your {body part} from the {adjective} weather.

Most important: never forget the {noun} or say {silly word}.
